meaning: adj.扩及同空间的,伸及同时间的,同延的
examples: The library has become coextensive with the Internet.
The District of Columbia is coextensive with the city of Washington.
The organics and impregnations of uranium are everywhere coextensive.
Some day all of us will be copacetic with electronically stored information and the lawsuit discovery process will be coextensive with eDiscovery.
